Home.description: I work with Odoo and web development. I build solutions that automate processes, organise operations, and turn ideas into digital products.
Home.base: I am based in Luanda, completing my Computer Engineering degree at ISPTEC, and working with Python, Odoo, and web technologies.

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: I am an Odoo Developer and final-year Computer Engineering student working with ERP, automation, and digital products.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.subtitle: I build software to solve real problems and improve processes.
introduction.description: I am completing my Computer Engineering degree at ISPTEC. Along the way, I have worked in software and contributed to projects related to education, employability, and urban mobility.
introduction.description2: Today I develop and customise Odoo solutions with Python, XML, QWeb, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs. I also build web products with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

toolkit.title: Working stack
toolkit.description: Tools I use to work with ERP, automation, integrations, and web interfaces.

espaes.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
espaes.description: I develop and customise Odoo modules, provide technical and functional support, turn requirements into workflows, and implement reports, automations, and REST integrations.

anda.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
anda.description: I developed Odoo modules, provided functional support, implemented REST integrations, and contributed to the migration from Odoo v15 to v18.

compllexus.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
compllexus.description: I customised Odoo modules, built features, adapted views, configured permissions, and supported automation with Python, XML, and PostgreSQL.

rising.title: Frontend Developer
rising.description: I developed and maintained the platform frontend with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI, working with design, product, and backend teams.

illustra.title: Founder
illustra.description: I created a small development studio to turn ideas into digital products, from concept to implementation.

education.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering
education.company: Instituto Superior Politécnico de Tecnologias e Ciências (ISPTEC)
education.description: I am completing the degree with a focus on my final project, computer networks, programming, and web applications. I am an INAGBE scholarship recipient.

Projects.subtitle: A selection of projects, interfaces, and products I built or helped create.

Admin.invalidProjectUrl: The project link is not a valid public URL.
Admin.privateProjectUrl: Use a public URL; local or private links cannot be captured.

four.title: Version 4.0

three.title: Version 3.0
three.description: I updated the design, improved performance, and simplified navigation.
